overall_justification: While the edition primarily focuses on coffee market updates and shipping news, the prominent placement and positive framing of articles discussing the Taubaté Convention agreement and its implications for coffee valorization strongly suggest an overall expansionist stance. The paper celebrates the agreement as a positive step, highlighting the government's active role in coffee purchases and emphasizing the expected benefits for the coffee industry.  Although there's no explicit mention of the "Caixa de Conversão" itself, the enthusiastic support for the broader valorization scheme, which the Caixa would facilitate, implies approval of measures designed to support coffee prices and potentially involve government intervention in currency markets.  The absence of any articles or editorials expressing concerns about potential inflationary risks or criticizing the agreement from an orthodox perspective further reinforces this classification.

supporting_evidence.quote: Hontem, à noite, o sr. presidente do Estado recebeu um telegramma do sr. dr. Albuquerque Lins communicando a assignatura do accordo entre os Estados signatarios do Convênio de Taubaté para a immediata execução das suas cláusulas.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This prominently placed article announces the signing of the Taubaté agreement, highlighting its importance and framing it as positive news.

supporting_evidence.quote: O sr. presidente do Estado recebeu hontem innumeros cumprimentos pessoaes, por cartas, cartões e telegrammas, pela assignatura do accordo celebrado entre os representantes dos governos de S. Paulo, Minas e Rio, para a immediata execução do Convênio de Taubaté.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote further emphasizes the positive reception of the Taubaté agreement, suggesting widespread approval and reinforcing the paper's implicit endorsement.

supporting_evidence.quote: Por conta do governo do Estado foram adquiridas sabbado em Santos mais 60.000 saccas de café, na base de 4$800 por 10 kilos, typo 4.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This detail about government coffee purchases demonstrates a concrete action related to the valorization scheme, further supporting the expansionist lean.
